title: cliflix
summary:
Watch anything instantaneously, just write its name. 
 Watch anything instantaneously, just write its name. It searches a torrent for you and streams it using WebTorrenthttpsgithub.comfabiospampinatowebtorrent-clitreeiina-pip to your favorite app. It supports subtitles too. shell npm install -g cliflix Execute cliflix to run a wizard, it'll ask you everything it needs a search query, which torrent to stream, and which app to use. If you want it may also search for subtitles for you.
